positive: An abstract, geometric scene featuring stylized celestial bodies (moons, stars, planets) orbiting within a vibrant, distressed nebula cloud. The composition should be centered, emphasizing clean, bold silhouettes against a high-contrast background of deep indigo, cosmic sapphire, and electric cyan. Incorporate minimal, interconnected geometric lines and constellations that form a repeating, stylized pattern suitable for screen printing on fabric. The style should be graphic, retro-futuristic, combining the aesthetic of mid-century modern design with scientific illustration. Use crisp lines, flat color blocks, and a vibrant, energetic glow emanating from the cores of the celestial bodies. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed, vector art quality, isolated on a clean white background for print clarity.
